title: Better BlockLooks
description: Resource packs that are used to make community, streamed and private servers that make it look different for reasons.
body:
```This resource pack is now archived, due to being abandoned and no incoming downloads. A newer project of Resource Pack is avaliable in the organization.```


Better BlockLooks, a way for your community/friend/private server to hide or disguise any blocks that will ruin your server's looks.

For server decoration and looks
